seoTitle: Mount White vs Mount Wilson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount White and Mount Wilson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount White vs Mount Wilson: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount White and Mount Wilson.
heading: Mount White vs Mount Wilson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount White, New South Wales and Mount Wilson, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Wilson has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Mount White (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount White or Mount Wilson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount White has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Mount Wilson scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount White scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Wilson scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount White or Mount Wilson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Wilson has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
